headings: Section 35. Default; Termination; Termination for Convenience.
text: Section 48. Authorship of Subcontract. Both Contractor and Subcontractor have consulted with independent legal  and  financial  counsel  of  their  own  choosing  in  order  to  fully  consider  the  effects  of  the  Subcontract  and suggest changes or make revisions where desired. After such consultation, the Subcontract was drafted jointly by both parties. Accordingly, the parties agree that this Subcontract along with the Contract Documents fully captures the  intent  of  the  parties,  and  is  not  to  be  construed  or  interpreted  against  either  party  on  the  grounds  of  sole  or primary authorship.
